name: Funky Pesto with Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 large red pepper, roasted, peeled and seeded
1 pound green beans, blanched to crisp-tender
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the red pepper, parsley, cilantro, and walnuts in the work bowl of the food processor.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Add the cheese and blend to incorporate.
4. With the machine still running, slowly add the olive oil and process for 30 seconds.
5. Remove from bowl and season with salt and pepper.
6. Drop the cooked beans into a water bath to reheat.
7. Place the beans in a mixing bowl and add the pesto.
8. Toss and season with salt and pepper.
9. Serve in a large pretty bowl.
Yield: vegetables for 8 servings
